transparency.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way to ensure their operation is sufficiently transparent to enable deployers to interpret the system's output and use it appropriately.

sub_checks.item: Model documentation with intended purpose and limitations
sub_checks.evidence: README.md contains model purpose, methodology, and limitations.

sub_checks.item: Clear disclosure that AI is used in credit decisions
sub_checks.evidence: Streamlit dashboard clearly indicates AI-based decisioning.

sub_checks.item: Explanation of key factors influencing each decision
sub_checks.evidence: SHAP, LIME, and counterfactual explanations provided for each decision.

human_oversight.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons.

sub_checks.evidence: Dashboard provides prediction + explanation for human review before final decision.
System outputs recommendations, not final decisions. Human retains override authority.
Fairness flags trigger escalation for applicants in monitored demographic groups.

data_governance.description: Training, validation and testing data sets shall be subject to appropriate data governance and management practices.

sub_checks.evidence: Preprocessing pipeline documents data cleaning steps, feature engineering, and quality checks.
Fairness audit completed across 4 protected attributes. Status: PASS
UCI ML Repository dataset with documented provenance (Taiwan bank, 2005, 30,000 records).

robustness.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way that they achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity.

sub_checks.evidence: Three model architectures compared. Cross-validation performed. Train/val/test split maintains population representativeness.
Model comparison pipeline enables fallback to alternative model if primary model degrades.

summary:
EU AI ACT COMPLIANCE ASSESSMENT
==================================================
Risk Classification: HIGH-RISK (Credit Scoring)
Overall Status: COMPLIANT

✅ Article 13 — Transparency: PASS
    ✓ Model documentation with intended purpose and limitations
    ✓ Clear disclosure that AI is used in credit decisions
    ✓ Explanation of key factors influencing each decision
✅ Article 14 — Human Oversight: PASS
    ✓ Human-in-the-loop for final credit decisions
    ✓ Override capability documented
    ✓ Escalation procedures for edge cases
✅ Article 10 — Data and Data Governance: PASS
    ✓ Training data quality assessment
    ✓ Bias testing on training data
    ✓ Data provenance documentation
✅ Article 15 — Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity: PASS
    ✓ Model performance monitoring plan
    ✓ Adversarial robustness testing
    ✓ Fallback procedures documented
